String: The production of armor is one of the most important aspects of arming others, and heavy armor gives additional protection
Medical supplies are some of the most important aspects, and those who can produce them are key.

Those who can produce mechanical augmentations will be able to arm those around them with some hyper-advanced technology.
Those who can produce nanomachine augmentations will be able to arm those around them with some hyper-advanced technology.
Through hijacking the Universal Positioning System, clones are able to find each other anywhere, at any time.
Those who can produce deployables will be able to arm others with the ultimate tools of territorial dominance.

To capture territory for a faction, one has to learn the skill necessary to utilize territorial deployables.
